docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GOODWIN, AUSTIN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT TERNG, KA YI AUDREY STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
